projects.name: Gopie
projects.short_description: Data Analysis, Web APIs, AI Readiness, as easy as pie
projects.description: Analyze data in natural language. GoPie is an open-source platform for natural-language data exploration that turns datasets into blazing-fast, AI-ready database with auto-generated APIs. No technical expertise required.

form.question: How to support
form.response: Use Gopie, Give Feedback and PRs are welcome.

form.question: A small brief about your project
form.response: Gopie enables low-tech/no-tech users to analyze and draw insights from their data with Natural Language. It enables users to build data driven applications by exposing the database as high performance REST Apis.

form.question: One FOSS maintainer lesson for your younger self
form.response: Ship first, get feedback and iterate, do not wait for perfection.

form.question: Why do you do it? Why do you bother maintaining a FOSS project?
form.response: Being able to build things that solve problems is like a superpower and with great power comes great responsibility. Gopie is our little effort in being good stewards of this power.

form.question: If your repo had a theme song, what would it be?
Which file in your project would you most like to set on fire?
What's your open-source villain origin story?
If you had to use one emoji to convey what it is like to be a FOSS maintainer, what would it be?
